{
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> EmailColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Email, configuration);

    public static void EmailHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Email);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> StreetColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Address.Street, configuration);

    public static void StreetHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Address.Street);

    public static void StreetRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Address.Street, value);

    public static void StreetFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Address.Street);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> CityColumn<TStyle>(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<TStyle, global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Address.City, configuration);

    public static void CityHeadingText<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityOrder<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityWidth<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityHeadingStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityCellStyle<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Action<TStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityFormat<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityNullDisplay<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityIsHtml<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Address.City);

    public static void CityRender<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Address.City, value);

    public static void CityFilter<TStyle>(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee, TStyle> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Address.City);
